result.stdout:
Description:
  define and manage Powershell module dependencies

Usage:
  PowerPrepare.App [command] [options]

Options:
  --config <config>          path to PowerPrepare configuration file [default: ./PowerPrepare.yaml]
  --powershell <powershell>  path to powershell to be used
  --powershell-tool          run powershell as a dotnet tool
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
  --version                  Show version information

Commands:
  new                   create new PowerPrepare configuration file
  list                  list required PowerShell modules
  add <module-name>     add a PowerShell module
  remove <module-name>  remove a PowerShell module
  install               install required PowerShell modules

  --powershell-tool          run powershell as a dotnet tool
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
  --version                  Show version information

Commands:
  new                   create new PowerPrepare configuration file
  list                  list required PowerShell modules
  add <module-name>     add a PowerShell module
  remove <module-name>  remove a PowerShell module
  install               install required PowerShell modules

result.stdout:
Description:
  add a PowerShell module

Usage:
  PowerPrepare.App add <module-name> [options]

Arguments:
  <module-name>  module name to add to configuration

Options:
  --module-version, --mv <module-version>  module version to add to configuration
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information
